violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean outside ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving, carts and racks in kitchen and prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceilings need deep cleaned. -Tile floors are in poor condition and need replaced.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
